creator: volf@oasis.IAEhv.nl
text:
I'm the maintainer of the news/unpost port. Unfortunately the last known 
ftp site for this port has been removed last week. Would it be possible
that this file will be hosted in

   ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/LOCAL_PORTS

Of so, please copy the file to that directory and fix the Makefile for
this port. Or let me know if the copy is done and I'll send in a new
PR with the patch for the Makefile

Thanks,

          Frank
